# Coding Teaching Demo Assignment

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Give an example of a coding exercise about an environmental issue in a programming course. This should not be exclusively done in the ArcGIS platform. You will have 45 minutes followed by 15 minutes for questions. Presume that students have no coding background.

In your demo, you should showcase writing new code. Please include creating a short, single-use script that turns out to be valuable, then converting that snippet into a function and reusing it across a much larger part of the investigation. 
:::
